parsed.production_notes: The video uses pre-existing clips from movies featuring a well-known actor. The footage is clearly human-recorded, with natural expressions, lighting, and movements.

characters.appearance: A middle-aged South Indian man with a dark complexion, a medium build, and short black hair. He has prominent, expressive facial features and is known for his comedic expressions.
characters.wardrobe: In the 'before' state, he wears a simple, short-sleeved, collared orange shirt. In the 'after' state, he wears a light blue suit jacket over a white collared shirt, a patterned blue tie, and black sunglasses.
characters.demeanor: Initially distressed and crying, then transitioning to hysterical laughter. In the second state, he is extremely confident, cool, and self-assured.

scenes.setting: A split-screen comparison. The top panel is an indoor setting with a light green wall. The bottom panel is an outdoor village street with a tiled roof building in the background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium shot of Character A, a middle-aged South Indian man, indoors. He is leaning against a white pillar next to a light green wall, wearing a bright orange collared shirt. His expression shifts from crying with his head down to looking up with a wide, hysterical laugh, showing his teeth. The lighting is simple and even.

A medium shot of Character A walking confidently towards the camera on an outdoor village street. He is wearing a light blue suit, a white shirt, a patterned blue tie, and dark sunglasses. He holds a white paper or book in his left hand. The background shows a building with a traditional tiled roof and several other people, including women in sarees, walking behind him. The lighting is bright daylight.

scenes.visual_description: A static, vertically split-screen meme format. The top panel shows Character A in an orange shirt, first crying and then laughing hysterically against an indoor wall. The bottom panel shows the same Character A, now dressed in a smart blue suit and sunglasses, walking confidently down a village street. Text overlays are present on both panels. The top text reads 'நான் 2000-3000 ரூபாய் செலவு பண்ணி ஆங்கிலம் கத்துக்க முடியாதுனு சொல்லி அழுதுட்டே இருக்கேன்.' The bottom text reads 'MySivi appல 1 ரூபாய்க்கு English கத்துக்க ஆரம்பிச்ச அப்பறம்'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
நான் 2000-3000 ரூபாய் செலவு பண்ணி ஆங்கிலம் கத்துக்க முடியாதுனு சொல்லி அழுதுட்டே இருக்கேன். (I was crying, saying I can't learn English by spending 2000-3000 rupees.)

MySivi appல 1 ரூபாய்க்கு English கத்துக்க ஆரம்பிச்ச அப்பறம் (After starting to learn English for 1 rupee on the MySivi app)
